programme.title: Thirst With Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Shay Mitchell explores the world one drink at a time as she visits exotic locations, samples unique ingredients, and meets expert hosts; on her journey, she encounters the latest drink trends, the best bars, and 8,000 years of sipping history.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: Game such as wild boar and elk must be cooked with care and attention.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin disagrees with a psychiatric consultant's diagnosis of a nanny accused of abuse; Eddie confronts her boss; Frank is forced to make staffing changes he is skeptical about; a woman claims she heard someone plotting a murder.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead at a men's-only club, Danny and Baez investigate if her death was an accident; Frank hears about an alleged affair between the chief of Internal Affairs and the spouse of another member of law enforcement.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Helping prospective buyers find their dream home in the country.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: A lovable Chihuahua gets rushed to RAPS after a serious car accident; a one-year-old cat has an unknown object lodged in her throat; the surprises continue when a box of abandoned kittens is found outside RAPS.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Contestants from previous seasons return to face a series of unique challenges judged by culinary experts and world-famous chefs.

programme.title: Find My Country House: Australia
programme.desc: Matt and Angela conclude the series in picturesque Maleny, surrounded by lush rainforests and breathtaking views; Catriona assists them in finding a paradise that embraces nature's beauty and tranquility.

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The home cooks go back to school to compete in one of the biggest team challenges in "MasterChef Canada" history.

programme.desc: Jamie prepares Trapani-style rigatoni with griddled chicory salad, rocket and Parmesan salad and limoncello kinda trifle.

programme.desc: Mary offers four ways to expand viewers' chicken repertoire so it will never be boring or dry again.

programme.desc: Spencer prepares a quick, nutritious lasagna dish.

programme.desc: After an EMT is shot and killed, Danny and Baez work to determine who is behind a chain of ambulance robberies; Frank defends New York's homeless community after the mayor puts a new law in place; Eddie offers to help Jamie pay off his student loans.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Last Scene Alive
programme.desc: A production crew descends on the town of Lawrenceton, Ga., to film a movie that's based on a book by Aurora's former boyfriend. Aurora soon finds herself searching for clues and suspects when the actress who plays her in the movie winds up dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Many people often consider casserole as their comfort food; Mary creates different variations of it, including breakfast as well as dessert.

programme.title: Spencer and a Movie
programme.sub-title: Spring Rolls; Olives & Pickles; Kettle Corn; Tostadas; Potato Skins
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts whips up sweet and spicy kettle corn, a boozy cranberry lemonade candy slushie, a delicious sharing plate; a creative take on the classic gin and tonic, potato skins, crispy spring rolls and delicious chorizo tostadas.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Mystery box challenge with a dessert but only five will be tasted before the immunity round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Bottom three face an elimination challenge; ice cream float with a helium filled toffee balloon.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Immunity challenge with a twist; three top competitors from the last challenge; each competitor must face a professional chef.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: The cooks are split into teams for a tricky challenge; it tests their ability to work together as they try to create an edible art installation in under seven hours.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: The blue team faces elimination in a taste-test challenge; must create a dish in 75 minutes to gain a spot in the next round.
